mission: To be the most admired group of luxury brands, setting the standard for creativity, sustainability, and craftsmanship while nurturing the unique DNA of each brand.

core_values: Creativity & Innovation — pushing boundaries while respecting heritage
Craftsmanship — obsessive attention to quality and detail
Sustainability — responsible luxury that respects people and planet
Inclusivity — diverse voices drive stronger brands
Entrepreneurship — each brand operates with autonomy and accountability
culture.operating_model: Federated model — brands operate with high autonomy under a shared Group umbrella. Group provides platforms (HR, Finance, Tech) but does NOT dictate creative or commercial direction.
culture.key_tension: Balancing shared Group identity with brand-specific uniqueness. The Group must 'support, not impose.'

group_dna.description: The shared identity traits that define what it means to be a leader in the Gucci Group, regardless of brand.
pillars: Vision — ability to see beyond the present and drive brand evolution
Entrepreneurship — owner mindset, calculated risk-taking, accountability
Passion — deep emotional connection to craft, quality, and brand heritage
Trust — integrity, transparency, empowering teams, cross-functional collaboration
group_dna.principle: A Gucci Group leader embodies all 4 pillars but expresses them through the lens of their specific brand's DNA.

strategic_priorities: Build a shared leadership language without homogenizing brands
Develop next-generation leaders who can lead across brands
Create a culture of continuous feedback and development
Strengthen employer brand as world's best luxury employer
